entities.name: CARBOFURAN
entities.description: An insecticide applied at 10 and 50 ppm to soil to study its effect on nitrogen transformation

entities.name: UREA NITROGEN
entities.description: The nitrogen source whose transformation in soil is being studied

entities.name: SANDY LOAM
entities.description: The type of soil used in the laboratory study

entities.name: UREA HYDROLYSIS
entities.description: The process of breaking down urea into other forms of nitrogen

entities.name: NITRIFICATION
entities.description: The biological oxidation of ammonia to nitrite followed by the oxidation of nitrite to nitrate

entities.name: AMMONIUM
entities.description: The NH4+ ion produced during urea hydrolysis

entities.name: NITRITE
entities.description: The N02- ion produced during the first step of nitrification

entities.name: NITRATE
entities.description: The N03- ion produced during the second step of nitrification

entities.name: PH
entities.description: The measure of acidity or alkalinity of the soil
